text_block_list.text:
I see Zenno Rob Roy talking with<n>someone in the
central plaza...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see... So, you mean to say that<n>the spell
failed because I didn't recite<n>the incantation
written in the grimoire<n>correctly?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yep, exactly! And now that you know<n>what the
problem was, it'll definitely<n>work next time!
choice_data_list: What are you two talking about?
What are you two talking about?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh... Um, hello.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I was just talking about magic with<n>Sweep.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Mmhmm! I am Sweep Toshoafter all, Tracen's greatest magicalgirl!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy is a fellow magic<n>connoisseur. Her
knowledge almost<n>rivals my own!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't call myself a connoisseur.<n>I've just
picked up a lot of stuff from<n>the books I've read.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Don't be so humble! Why, just the<n>other day...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Under an overpass with no one in<n>sight... Oh yes,
this is the perfect spot<n>for some serious magic
practice.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Well? Are you excited or are youexcited?! This is how it feels to bea magical girl! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Before we begin, I'll teach you the<n>four magical
elements. This is very,<n>very important, so pay
attention!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you mean like fire, water, earth,<n>and wind?
And then you add aether to<n>make the fifth one,
unless I'm<n>mistaken...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
A-ah... So you already know all of<n>them?! You
really did your research!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...That's also when our spell fizzled<n>out into
nothing, remember?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Right! It's decided, then! We're going<n>to do some
more magic training and<n>stage a comeback!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: What?! Right now?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Once I come up with an idea, I go all<n>in! Plus, I
think you've got the<n>potential!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! I'm down for any training<n>you fancy,
Rob Roy. Let me hear it!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Uh, um... Well... I can't really come up<n>with
anything on the spot...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Fine. In that case... You there, Trainer!<n>Coming up
with training plans is your<n>job, right?

...It's fallen on me to think of a plan.<n>The first one
that springs to mind is...
choice_data_list: Deepen your knowledge with more reading.
Start off with some strength training!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! I do love reading. That might be<n>the perfect
place to start.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Then behold my most prized grimoire!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It might be a little intense for a<n>beginner, but I'll
help you make sense<n>of the parts you don't get.
♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Now, if we're going to be<n>studying,
why don't we head over to<n>the library?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's jump right in with the<n>chapter on
fundamentals... Hm?<n>What's this word again?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Do you mean this one? Hm, if I were<n>to guess
from context...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I believe it means "to concentrate."

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ah, right, uh-huh! I just remembered!<n>Yep, that's
totally it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: And what does this word right here<n>mean aga—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no! What I mean is, let's see if<n>you can
figure out how to read this<n>part yourself, Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, okay. Actually, I was pretty<n>curious to see
what else was written<n>here.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Once I start reading, I'll just keep<n>going, so listen
carefully, okay<n>Sweep?

The girls read for a while, deepening<n>their
concentration and knowledge of<n>magic.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Aren't we supposed to be doing<n>magic training?
I don't feel like that's<n>all that relevant...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Actually, magic is deeply tied<n>to physical
strength.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Really?! I thought it was all about<n>increasing
magical power!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Well, for example, if you cast a<n>levitation spell on
a boulder, but it<n>doesn't rise up...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You can lift it using your arms instead!<n>In times
like those, you need "muscle<n>magic"!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Can you really call that... magic?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Now, to the gym! I'll show<n>you a great
muscle magic training<n>regimen!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Phew. I really worked up a sweat. Do<n>you think
I'm getting the hang of it?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You were fantastic! Not on my level<n>yet, but those
were some good<n>moves, Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've used up our energy,<n>it's the
perfect time to take a break<n>and recharge with
something sweet. ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that sounds wonderful. Let's<n>head to the
cafeteria.

The girls head to the cafeteria after<n>finishing their
"muscle magic" training.
